API Reference

# Get Requests

This API returns all the cross-chain transactions.

GET

https://api.relay.linkhttps://api.testnets.relay.link

/

requests

/

v2

Try it

cURL

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request GET \
  --url https://api.relay.link/requests/v2
```

200

Copy

```

#### Query Parameters

[​

](#parameter-limit)

limit

number

default:20

Required range: `1 <= x <= 50`

[​

](#parameter-continuation)

continuation

string

[​

](#parameter-user)

user

string

[​

](#parameter-hash)

hash

string

[​

](#parameter-origin-chain-id)

originChainId

number

[​

](#parameter-destination-chain-id)

destinationChainId

number

[​

](#parameter-private-chains-to-include)

privateChainsToInclude

string

[​

](#parameter-id)

id

string

[​

](#parameter-order-id)

orderId

string

[​

](#parameter-include-order-data)

includeOrderData

boolean

[​

](#parameter-start-timestamp)

startTimestamp

number

[​

](#parameter-end-timestamp)

endTimestamp

number

[​

](#parameter-start-block)

startBlock

number

[​

](#parameter-end-block)

endBlock

number

[​

](#parameter-chain-id)

chainId

string

Get all requests for a single chain in either direction. Setting originChainId and/or destinationChainId will override this parameter.

[​

](#parameter-referrer)

referrer

string

[​

](#parameter-sort-by)

sortBy

enum<string>

default:createdAt

Available options:

`createdAt`,

`updatedAt`

[​

](#parameter-sort-direction)

sortDirection

enum<string>

Available options:

`asc`,

`desc`

#### Response

200 - application/json

Default Response

[​

](#response-requests)

requests

object\[\]

Show child attributes

Example:

```
